rows.case_name: Public Prosecutor v Tan Cheng Yew
rows.content_text: JUDGMENT-SENTINEL-FULL-TEXT-MUST-NOT-RENDER 1. The appellant was charged under section 420 of the Penal Code. 2. The full grounds of decision run to many paragraphs and must never be readable on the catalogue site.
rows.court_summary: Outcome: appeal dismissed; sentence of 36 months upheld.
rows.summary: The Court of Appeal upheld the conviction and sentence for cheating offences, clarifying the sentencing framework.
